title: Reproducibility code for condition-aware CALCE LiCoO2/graphite V-SoC calibration
description: This repository contains reproducibility code for dataset consistency checks, representative-cell selection, condition-family visualization, statistical analysis, sparse gated correction, measured-grid profile evaluation, and isotonic LUT construction for condition-aware V-SoC calibration of the CALCE LiCoO2/graphite lithium-ion battery dataset.

creators.name: Biçer, Emre
creators.affiliation: Sivas University of Science and Technology
